en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.\n

The Austria Trade License is a statutory authorization required for most businesses to lawfully conduct commercial activities, including certain facility operations that may involve workplace safety, environmental protection, or facility condition requirements. The Austria Trade License can be obtained by submitting an application to district authority or online via the Austrian Trade Information System. Trade, Commerce, and Industry Regulation Act Federal Ministry of Labour and Economy

Is your company required to hold an Austria Trade License in accordance with the Austrian Trade, Commerce, and Industry Regulation Act, as administered by the Austrian Federal Ministry of Labour and Economy and the relevant district or municipal authorities?\n
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Austria legislation.
